results.title: Cuddle Clones | BBB Complaints | Better Business Bureau
results.content:
If you receive the Cuddle Clone and are not satisfied, you are absolutely welcome to contact us within REMOVED line with our 100% Satisfaction Guarantee for plushes. Once youve had the chance to see the final product in person, well be able to properly review your request and assist you from there.

Im truly sorry that communication felt lacking toward the end of the process, thats not the experience we want for any customer, and your feedback is being taken seriously. I know this didnt arrive in time for Christmas, and I completely understand how frustrating that is after planning ahead and paying for additional services. [...] Date:02/12/2026

Thank you for the opportunity to respond.

First and foremost, we genuinely understand how emotional this process can be, especially when it involves memorializing a beloved pet. We recognize that this experience has been frustrating, and we sincerely regret that the outcome did not meet the customer’s expectations.

However, we would like to clarify several important points regarding our policies and the customization process.

At the beginning of the remake process—before the customer returned the original plush—we clearly communicated that once a clone enters production, it is no longer eligible for a full refund. This policy exists because each plush is handcrafted and custom-made. The customer chose to proceed with the remake under these terms. [...] the pants. I contacted customer service and was promised a replacement immediately. It is now February and I still have nothing.They respond to emails only to apologize and say they are working on it, but months later there is still no product. Apologies do not replace broken promises.This company lacks quality control, honesty, and accountability. I would strongly recommend shopping elsewhere. #### Business Response

results.content:
Reply from Cuddle Clones

Mar 17, 2026

Hi Jim,

We’re so sorry to hear about your experience — this is absolutely not the kind of service we aim to provide.

We understand how frustrating this must be, especially given the importance of your order as a gift. We’ve reached out to you directly to review your case and provide a resolution as quickly as possible.

Please check your email when you have a moment, and we’ll make sure this is taken care of.

Thank you for your honest feedback. We’re very sorry to hear the product did not meet your expectations in both quality and materials, and we also understand how frustrating the repeated emails have been.

We appreciate you taking the time to share your experience, as feedback like this helps highlight where we need to improve — not only in our products, but also in how we communicate with customers.

We want to clarify that our rush service applies specifically to the production timeline. This means your order is prioritized to be completed within the selected timeframe, but it does not include expedited shipping or guarantee a delivery date.

results.title: How can I fix this serious git clone error? · community · Discussion #48568 · GitHub
results.content:
The error you're encountering, "error: 6546 bytes of body are still expected," and "fetch-pack: unexpected disconnect while reading sideband packet," typically indicates an issue with the network connection or the remote repository's availability.

Here are a few steps you can try to resolve the issue:

Check your internet connection: Make sure you have a stable internet connection. Try running a speed test or accessing other websites to verify that your connection is working properly.

Retry the clone operation: Sometimes, a temporary network glitch or server issue can cause the clone operation to fail. Try running the git clone command again. [...] The error you're encountering, "error: 6546 bytes of body are still expected," and "fetch-pack: unexpected disconnect while reading sideband packet," typically indicates an issue with the network connection or the remote repository's availability.

Here are a few steps you can try to resolve the issue:

Check your internet connection: Make sure you have a stable internet connection. Try running a speed test or accessing other websites to verify that your connection is working properly.

Retry the clone operation: Sometimes, a temporary network glitch or server issue can cause the clone operation to fail. Try running the `git clone` command again.

`git clone` [...] | The error you're encountering, "fetch-pack: unexpected disconnect while reading sideband packet" along with "fatal: early EOF" and "fatal: fetch-pack: invalid index-pack output," often indicates a network or connectivity issue while cloning a Git repository from a remote server. Here are some steps to help you fix this issue:   1. Check Your Internet Connection: Ensure that your internet connection is stable and not experiencing interruptions. Slow or unstable internet connections can lead to incomplete downloads. 2. Retry the Clone: Sometimes, network issues are temporary. Retry the clone command to see if the issue resolves itself.   ``` git clone  ```   3. Use SSH: If you continue to face issues with HTTPS cloning, consider using SSH to clone the repository. ## 2 Answers 2

Reset to default

0

Watch out for broadcasts. They run for all clones as well as for the "parent" sprite. If you need to prevent this, make a local "for this sprite only" variable and set it to a value when a clone is created. Then on every broadcast, make sure that variable isn't that value. "For this sprite only" variables are different across clones, so this is perfect
